Server exposes 33 tools — large attack surface without per-tool permission controls
File reading tool "playwright_upload_file" may output sensitive file contents without filtering
Tool "end_codegen_session" references file without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "playwright_navigate" description is only 17 chars. LLM will hallucinate capabilities based on the name alone.
Tool "playwright_upload_file" references file without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "playwright_resize" references user without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "playwright_post" uses vague action words (perform) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "playwright_put" uses vague action words (perform) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "playwright_patch" uses vague action words (perform) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "playwright_expect_response" uses vague action words (do) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tool "playwright_custom_user_agent" references user without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "playwright_press_key" references key without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "playwright_save_as_pdf" references file without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
